utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Look , look , your daughter and I are supposed to leave tonight for our honeymoon , now ... now you ... you tell her that I am gonna be at that airport and I hope that she will be there too !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh yeah , I said Rachel name , but it did not mean anything , Okay ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: She is ... she is just a friend and that is all !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Now just tell Emily that I love her and that I can not imagine spending my life with anyone else .

emotion_cause.span: 7_I can not imagine spending my life with anyone else .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Please , promise me that you will tell her that .

emotion_cause.span: 7_I can not imagine spending my life with anyone else .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Waltham
utterances.text: All right , I will tell her . Come on bugger face !

utterances.speaker: Mr. Waltham
utterances.text: You spend half your life in the bathroom , why do not you ever go out the bloody window !
